tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC01 stub with real test body for BUG1 combined -lc flag
tasks_completed.changes: Added correct sys.path (parents[3]), imported strip_non_executable_contexts, added grep_match helper, asserts rm visible after bash -lc

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC02 stub for BUG1 combined -ce flag
tasks_completed.changes: Same pattern: bash -ce 'rm /tmp/x' must expose rm

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC03 stub for BUG2 sudo -u root
tasks_completed.changes: sudo -u root bash -c 'rm /tmp/x' must expose rm

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC04 stub for BUG2 sudo -H no-arg flag
tasks_completed.changes: sudo -H bash -c 'rm /tmp/x' must expose rm; -H must not consume bash as its argument

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC05 stub for BUG2 sudo -- terminator
tasks_completed.changes: sudo -- bash -c 'rm /tmp/x' must expose rm; -- terminates option parsing

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC06 stub for BUG3 /bin/bash heredoc pipe
tasks_completed.changes: cat <<'EOF' | /bin/bash must preserve heredoc body containing 'rm /tmp/x'

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC07 stub for BUG3 /usr/bin/bash heredoc pipe
tasks_completed.changes: cat <<'EOF' | /usr/bin/bash must preserve heredoc body; used grep_match (line-by-line) per AC7 note

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC08 stub for BUG3 non-shell absolute path does not preserve
tasks_completed.changes: cat <<'EOF' | /tmp/bash.old must NOT preserve body; bash.old not in _SHELL_INTERPS

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC09 stub — full suite regression check
tasks_completed.changes: Runs hooks/tests/test_bash_safety_context.py via subprocess; asserts exit 0 and >= 30 passed
tasks_completed.rationale: AC9 verifies no regression in baseline suite; subprocess approach matches spec intent

tasks_completed.description: Replaced TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinel in AC10 stub for BUG1 +c POSIX variant
tasks_completed.changes: bash +c 'rm /tmp/x' must expose rm; + prefix handled alongside - prefix

git_rationale.root_cause_commit: N/A — stubs were generated with TEST_INCOMPLETE sentinels; implementation was already in hooks/lib/bash_context_strip.py
git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: Test-writer generated stub files with pytest.fail() placeholders pending dev implementation; QA-impl-A confirmed all 10 remained incomplete
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Each stub replaced with real test body matching the reference implementation in hooks/tests/test_bash_safety_context.py; import path fixed from relative 'hooks/lib' to absolute Path(__file__).parents[3]

new_symbols_introduced: grep_match (local helper in AC01-AC05, AC07, AC08, AC10 stubs)
diff_stats.justification_for_overage: Each stub file required: (1) from pathlib import Path, (2) sys.path.insert with absolute path, (3) from hooks.lib.bash_context_strip import ..., (4) local grep_match helper (8 lines), (5) 3-4 lines of test body. The high line count is proportional to 10 files each needing complete boilerplate. Individual test bodies are 3-4 lines each; the rest is necessary setup. No over-engineering.

dev.qa_notes: Run: python3 -m pytest tests/generated/20260524-125300-A/ -v from project root. All 10 tests should pass. AC09 also validates that hooks/tests/test_bash_safety_context.py passes with >= 30 tests (currently 40).

self_verification.notes: pytest tests/generated/20260524-125300-A/ -v: 10 passed in 0.31s. AC09 subprocess confirms hooks/tests/test_bash_safety_context.py: 40 passed.

recommendations: The SyntaxWarnings from \s and \t in auto-generated docstrings are from the auto-generated stub template (non-raw docstrings containing regex patterns). These do not affect test execution. The docstrings must be preserved verbatim per stub instructions.
